heading: Farm or food products; sale of samples, practical forms, etc.
label: 2247a Farm or food products; sale of samples, practical forms, etc.
text: The Secretary of Agriculture is authorized to sell samples, illustrations, practical forms, or sets of the grades recommended or promulgated by him for farm or food products, under such rules and regulations as he may prescribe, and the receipts therefrom shall be deposited in the Treasury to the credit of miscellaneous receipts.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 415e of this title

Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in the following Department of Agriculture appropriation acts:, .June 28, 1944, ch. 29658 Stat. 454, .July 12, 1943, ch. 21557 Stat. 421, .July 22, 1942, ch. 51656 Stat. 688, .July 1, 1941, ch. 26755 Stat. 431, .June 25, 1940, ch. 42154 Stat. 555, title I, .June 30, 1939, ch. 25353 Stat. 968
